programme.title: Laggies
programme.desc: Megan panics when her boyfriend proposes. She takes an opportunity to escape for a week.

programme.title: To Rome with Love
programme.desc: The lives of some visitors and residents of Rome and the romances, adventures and predicaments they get into.

programme.title: Rust and Bone
programme.desc: A bouncer rescues a woman from a barroom brawl, and their relationship evolves after she loses both her legs.

programme.title: Spread
programme.desc: High-end lothario Nikki sleeps his way to privilege while crashing at the home of a middle-aged female lawyer.

programme.title: Tulip Fever
programme.desc: An artist falls for a married woman while painting her during the Tulip mania of 17th century Amsterdam.

programme.title: Mongolian Death Worm
programme.desc: During an oil fracking operation, a nest of deadly creatures that have been dormant for centuries is awakened!

programme.title: King Cobra
programme.desc: The result of an experimental drug is a creature that is half cobra, half rattlesnake, and 30 feet long.

programme.title: The Messengers
programme.desc: An ominous darkness invades a farm in North Dakota, and the Solomon family is torn apart by mayhem and murder.

programme.title: Jessabelle
programme.desc: Returning to her childhood home, Jessabelle comes face to face with a long-tormented spirit.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: When their friend accidentally channels a mysterious signal, a group of co-eds rally to stop a terrifying evil

programme.title: The Grudge
programme.desc: A nurse is exposed to a supernatural curse, one that locks a person in a powerful rage before killing them.

programme.title: The Grudge 2
programme.desc: In Tokyo, the sister of a girl previously killed by an evil curse must learn how to stop it once and for all.

programme.title: The Grudge 3
programme.desc: A woman who holds the key to stopping the evil spirit of Kayako travels to the haunted Chicago apartment.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: MovieSphere provides Hollywood movies, blockbuster hits, and general entertainment programming.
